results.title: Ruling on loft conversion after it exceeded 'permitted development limits'
results.description: A loft conversion in Farnworth has been granted retrospective planning permission after exceeding permitted development limits, Bolton Council has confirmed.

results.title: ‘I love the inflation,’ Trump says as prices rise amid Iran war
results.description: President Donald Trump on Wednesday appeared to embrace data showing inflation has risen more than ‌4%, telling reporters that he “loved” inflation and reiterating his belief that prices will fall as soon as the Iran war ends. Asked about U.S. government data showing consumer inflation increased at its fastest pace in three years in May, and whether... results.title: Oracle expects 34% FY27 revenue growth as it plans $70B net cash capex outlay
results.description: Oracle (ORCL) Q4 FY2026 earnings call recap: cloud/AI surge, $638B RPO, FY27 guidance, CapEx and funding plans.

results.title: Councillors seal offices to push for mobility loans
results.description: Frustrated by perceived delays in the disbursement of their K6 million mobility loans, some ward councillors yesterday boycotted duty while others sealed their respective council offices across the country. Ministry of Finance, Economic Planning and Decentralisation announced on Monday the release of funds for councillors’ loans through the National Local Government Finance Committee, and youth ... The post Councillors seal offices to push for mobility loans appeared first on Nation Online .
